title: What a godly man actually chases
caption:
The man worth marrying is too busy becoming one.

Most men turn their faith into a dating strategy — pray more when lonely, read more when desperate. That's not faith. That's bargaining.

God doesn't want your best effort when you're anxious about being alone. He wants you when you don't need anything else from Him. That's where the real work happens.

You don't find the right woman by looking harder. You find her by becoming someone who actually has something to give — and then living that way long enough for it to be real.

Chase God first. Let the rest be fruit.

"Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33

—

Save this for the man who keeps making his faith about something else.

#faith #godlymen #christianmen #manofgod #scripture #discipleship #discipline #vision
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
